mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transport_dtl ( transport_id, calculation_cd, sender_receiver_cd, calculation_target_cd, waybill_no, kind_cd, untpc, qty, amount, rmk, shipment_operation_date, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{transportId}, #{calculationCd}, #{senderReceiverCd}, #{calculationTargetCd}, #{waybillNo}, #{kindCd}, #{untpc}, #{qty}, #{amount}, #{rmk}, #{shipmentOperationDate}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{chgId}, NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE transport_dtl SET transport_id = #{transportId}, calculation_cd = #{calculationCd}, waybill_no = #{waybillNo}, kind_cd = #{kindCd}, untpc = #{untpc}, qty = #{qty}, amount = #{amount}, rmk = #{rmk}, chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE transport_dtl_id = #{transportDtlId}

UPDATE transport_dtl SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE transport_dtl_id IN
#{id}
UPDATE transport_dtl SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE transport_id = #{transportId}
UPDATE transport_dtl SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = NOW() WHERE transport_id = #{transportId}
